speaker: speaker1
text: Well , I'm afraid I must be going now . I have no idea it was so late .

speaker: speaker1
text: I'm afraid I can't . I have a dinner party at seven tonight . You see , I am going to England the day after tomorrow .

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , I won't keep you then . It was very nice of you to come to see me .

speaker: speaker1
text: It has been a pleasure . Goodbye .

speaker: speaker2
text: Goodbye . Thank you again for coming .
